title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 166.501 - Program established as alternative to Missouri education program
text:
166.501.  Program established as alternative to Missouri education program. — Notwithstanding the provisions of sections 166.400 to 166.456 to the contrary, the higher education deposit program is established as a nonexclusive alternative to the Missouri education * program, and any participant may elect to participate in both programs subject to aggregate Missouri program limitations.
(L. 2004 H.B. 959 § 166.505, A.L. 2018 S.B. 882) 
*Statutory reference to "savings" program removed in accordance with section 3.060 based on the name change of the program in section 166.400 by H.B. 297, 2021.
